title: creeper fixed pivot points
description: fixes pivot points of creepers to have them to the body and not on top of the legs
body:
required: **[optifine](https://optifine.net/home) or [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) and [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)**

fixes creepers pivot points of their legs
